ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: IF( AND( OR(TEXT(Order_type__c)='ZMX3',TEXT(Order_type__c)='ZMX4'), TEXT(Order_Reason__c) != '101', TEXT(Order_Reason__c) != 'MX1', TEXT(Order_Reason__c) != 'Z11', TEXT(Order_Reason__c) != 'Z99', SAP_Order__c ), true, false )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Only can choose [101][MX1][Z11][Z99] Reason in crm
